section.div: Creator of Bazzite and Maintainer @ublue-os & @frostyard | @OpenGamingCollective Member | Linux Community Engineer @microsoft
Bazzite makes gaming and everyday use smoother and simpler across desktop PCs, handhelds, tablets, and home theater PCs.
The complete source code for City 17: Episode One. I am open to pull requests that fix bugs or add features the rest of the sourcemod community may find useful.
